description_long: This is a rustic log cabin elevated on a stone foundation, featuring a large gabled roof covered with gray shingles. The front of the cabin has a wide covered porch with wooden railings supported by stone pillars, providing a welcoming entryway. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving the structure a traditional and sturdy appearance. Multiple windows with wooden frames are distributed asymmetrically on the visible sides, allowing natural light to enter the interior. A prominent stone chimney rises from the side of the cabin, indicating the presence of a fireplace inside. The rear section of the cabin extends outward, supported by a solid stone base, and includes additional windows and a secondary roof section.
description: A rustic log cabin with a large gabled shingle roof, stone foundation, covered porch, and prominent stone chimney. The exterior features horizontal log walls and multiple asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wide covered porch with wooden railings, the main entrance area, and the expansive gabled roof supported by stone pillars.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the log wall construction, a cluster of windows, the stone chimney, and the extended rear section of the cabin.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the stone chimney, a smaller roofed extension, and additional windows set into the log walls above the stone foundation.
description_view_3: This perspective displays the side and rear of the cabin, showing the log construction, stone base, and the porch wrapping around the corner.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with a large overhang, covered in gray shingles, featuring a secondary gabled extension and a stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small to medium rectangular windows with wooden frames, arranged asymmetrically on the front, sides, and rear; some windows are grouped while others are isolated
attribute_door_placement: A single main door is located on the front facade, opening onto the covered porch; no other exterior doors are visible
